title: Bisulfite-seq for Astrocytes
author: Elena Coccia
materials: Extract genomic DNA using the QIAamp DNA Mini Kit (Qiagen) following manufacturer's instructions
Bisulfite conversion efficiency exceeded 99% in all samples
Adapter trimming and quality control with CutAdapt (RRID:SCR_011841)
Methylation analysis in R using methylKit
Differentially methylated regions annotated using UCSC genome annotations

steps.title: Harvest astrocytes using 1 mL TrypLE...
steps.instruction: Harvest astrocytes using 1 mL TrypLE Express per well of a 6-well plate

steps.title: Centrifuge cells and process for column-based DNA purification
steps.instruction: Centrifuge cells and process for column-based DNA purification

steps.title: Elute DNA in 80 µL; quantify...
steps.instruction: Elute DNA in 80 µL; quantify prior to submission (expected range: 51–198 ng/µL)

steps.title: Submit purified DNA to Zymo Research...
steps.instruction: Submit purified DNA to Zymo Research for Reduced Representation Bisulfite Sequencing (RRBS)

steps.title: Alignment to reference genome hg38 using Bismark (RRID:SCR_005604)
steps.instruction: Alignment to reference genome hg38 using Bismark (RRID:SCR_005604)

steps.title: Differential methylation assessed using logistic regression with FDR correction
steps.instruction: Differential methylation assessed using logistic regression with FDR correction
